definitions: A browser extension or tool designed to assist users in reading Japanese text by providing instant lookups of words and kanji.
A software utility that displays readings, meanings, and other information for Japanese words when the user hovers over them.
examples: I use Rikaikun to help me read Japanese websites.
Rikaikun is an invaluable tool for learners of Japanese.
Without Rikaikun, deciphering complex kanji would be much harder.
